headline: NYSE Owner Moves Deeper Into Crypto. This Top Fund Manager Is Bullish on Its Stock
summary: Intercontinental Exchange is investing in crypto exchange OKX at a $25 billion valuation. Barron’s Roundtable member Todd Ahlsten of Parnassus likes the stock because of its diversification efforts.

headline: Sen. Merkley proposes prediction market ban for government officials after Maduro, Iran bets
summary: After a series of dubious bets placed on the ouster of Venezuela's Maduro and Iran strikes, lawmakers are looking to ban insider trading on prediction markets.
